items.title: Evercore ISI Raises IBM Price Target to $330, Adds Stock to Tactical Outperform List
items.description: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) is one of the AI Stocks on Market Radar. On January 20, Evercore ISI analyst Amit Daryanani raised the price target on the stock to $330 from $315 and kept an Outperform rating. The firm also added IBM to its “Tactical Outperform list” ahead of IBM’s December-end quarterly results due […]

items.title: Stock Market Today, Jan. 21: Dow Rebounds After Greenland and Tariff Tensions Ease
items.description: Today, Jan. 21, 2026, U.S. stocks staged a relief rally as Trump's Davos remarks eased Greenland and tariff fears.

items.title: Tracking The Evolving Narrative For IBM (IBM) After The Latest Price Target Shift
items.description: What the Updated Price Target Signals About IBM's Story The recent change in the price target for International Business Machines is less about a single headline event and more about how analysts now frame the story around the company. Even without a detailed breakdown of the commentary, a shift in target alone tells you that expectations about risk, opportunity and timing have been reconsidered. items.description: IBM stock is heading into its January 28 earnings report with high expectations tied to the Z17 mainframe cycle, AI momentum, and guidance clarity for 2026.
